input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.6.2
            TITLE: catch cans must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.6.2: Catch cans must be:
T.5.6.2 Catch cans must be: 
a. Capable of containing boiling water without deformation 
b. Located rearwards of the Firewall below the driver’s shoulder level 
c. Positively retained, using no tie wraps or tape

final_answer: T.5.6.2 Catch cans must be: a. Capable of containing boiling water without deformation b. Located rearwards of the Firewall below the driver’s shoulder level c. Positively retained, using no tie wraps or tape
